_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead and align information technology (IT) security priorities with the security strategy.
reference_document_element_description: Lead selection, contracting, and performance oversight of strategic data and AI technology vendors and platform providers.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-004 (AB, cosine: 0.488), LS-T-002 (LS, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.500). Shared vocabulary: [lead, technology]. DCWF-only terms [align, information, priorities, security, strategy] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, contracting, data, oversight, performance, platform] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.884, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Lead and align information technology (IT) security priorities with the security" and "Lead selection, contracting, and performance oversight of strategic data and AI" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.508 ≈ STS 0.500 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [lead, technology] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [lead, technology]. DCWF-only: [align, information, priorities, security, strategy]. WIDAI-only: [ai, contracting, data, oversight, performance, platform].
